data.name: Climax Heroines
data.detailed_description:
特色列表

  • Traditional turnbased combat
  • Randomized loot, same chest can give either gold bars or a potion
  • Mine minerals, smelt them and make weapons and armor that will help you on your quest
  • Huge breasted women covered in penis mayonaise
  • The town evolves as you play, new shops open and it expands


關於此遊戲

Your hometown is in trouble!


Chinami, a warrior and her childhood friend, Haruka learn that the most powerful witch in their old hometown, Morgana has gone crazy. Morgana has been digging inside of her home, into deep catacombs and thus causing monsters to come crawling out of it. Many people have tried to go and stop this monster invasion but no one has come back.

Craft various weapons and armor as you make your way across each level of a dungeon with randomized loot.

Craft various weapons and armor as you make your way across each level of a dungeon with randomized loot.
data.short_description: Climax Heroines is a dungeon crawler about women with huge breasts trying to save their childhood home.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows 8.1/10 (32bit/64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL /Vram 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 or better Display

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS 10.13 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 or better Display
